steps.title: Use the graph value
steps.content: The displayed graph is $y=f(x)+4$. From the graph, when $x=0$, the value of $f(x)+4$ is $8$.

steps.title: Test the answer form
steps.content: Each choice has the form $f(x)=-6^x+c$. At $x=0$, $f(0)=-6^0+c=-1+c$. Set $-1+c=4$, so $c=5$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: Thus $f(x)=-6^x+5$, which matches the correct answer.
